user.title: Connect to wyoming-nanowakeword
user.description: Host and HTTP model API port of the wyoming-nanowakeword server (start it with --http-port, or enable http_api in the add-on).

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered NanoWakeWord server
zeroconf_confirm.description: Set up the NanoWakeWord server found at {host}. Provide the API token if the server requires one (the add-on prints it in its log).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the NanoWakeWord HTTP API. Check host, port and that the API is enabled.

upload_model.title: Upload a model file
upload_model.description: Upload a NanoWakeWord .onnx model or a models.yaml. The filename becomes the wake word id. {error}

data.filename: Store as filename (optional, defaults to the uploaded name)

delete_model.title: Delete a model file
delete_model.description: Remove a file from the server's model directory. {error}

restore_backup.title: Restore a backup
restore_backup.description: Upload a backup zip. The server's model directory is replaced with the backup contents. {error}

restore_saved.title: Restore a saved backup
restore_saved.description: Restore one of the backups stored in /config/nanowakeword. {error}

test_recording.title: Test a recording
test_recording.description: Upload a WAV recording of the wake word (or a false trigger) to see what scores each model gives. {error}

configure_verifier.title: Central verifier
configure_verifier.description: Hybrid satellite + server: candidate detections from this server are confirmed by another wyoming-nanowakeword instance (e.g. an ensemble on a stronger machine) before waking the pipeline. Leave the URL empty to disable. Use the Verification switch to toggle without losing the configuration. {error}

data.verify_token: Verifier API token (leave empty to keep current)
data.verify_model: Wake word id on the verifier (empty = same id)

error.invalid_filename: The filename must end with .onnx, or be exactly models.yaml (the only metadata file the server reads).
error.test_failed: The server could not score the recording.
error.settings_failed: The server rejected the settings change.

abort.not_loaded: The NanoWakeWord entry is not loaded.
abort.no_model_files: The server has no model files to delete.
abort.no_backups: No saved backups found in /config/nanowakeword. Use the Backup models button or service first.
abort.test_result: Result for {model}: {verdict} peak {peak} vs threshold {threshold} ({duration}s audio). Member peaks: {member_peaks}

backup.name: Backup models
backup.description: Downloads a zip of the server's model directory into /config/nanowakeword and returns its path.

entry_id.name: Server
entry_id.description: Config entry to back up. Optional when only one server is configured.

restore.name: Restore models
restore.description: Replaces the server's model directory with a backup zip.

entry_id.name: Server
entry_id.description: Config entry to restore. Optional when only one server is configured.

path.name: Backup path
path.description: Path to the backup zip, absolute or relative to /config.

upload_model.name: Upload model
upload_model.description: Uploads a local .onnx or models.yaml file to the server.

entry_id.name: Server
entry_id.description: Config entry to upload to. Optional when only one server is configured.

path.name: File path
path.description: Path to the model file, absolute or relative to /config.

delete_model.name: Delete model
delete_model.description: Deletes a file from the server's model directory.

entry_id.name: Server
entry_id.description: Config entry to delete from. Optional when only one server is configured.

filename.name: Filename
filename.description: Name of the file in the model directory.

entry_id.name: Server
entry_id.description: Config entry to reload. Optional when only one server is configured.
